summary: Frontend testing for Sovereign Hub button clickability, legacy toolbar removal, sensitive data scrubbing, and crash fixes. All 6 test criteria PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 376: isHubRoute correctly includes /sovereign-hub - legacy toolbars now hidden
CharacterSelect.js line 84: origins?.find with optional chaining prevents undefined.map crash
GravityWellExchange.js: Safe fallback (market || []).length === 0 shows empty state correctly
SovereignHub.js: All 40 navigation buttons have data-testid and are clickable without overlay issues
test_credentials: Not required for this test (unauthenticated testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported issues from user have been fixed: 1) Sovereign Hub buttons now clickable (40 nav buttons + 4 action buttons), 2) No legacy toolbars (ShambhalaToolbar, MANIFEST_BAR, Navigation) visible on /sovereign-hub, 3) No sensitive data (kyndsmiles@gmail.com, Steven Michael) visible on main page (note: Steven Michael appears in Trust Purpose Statement modal which is expected legal content), 4) /games page loads without undefined.map crash, 5) /gravity-well page loads with proper empty state

sovereign_hub_buttons.details: All 40 navigation buttons clickable, all 4 action buttons (View Trust Purpose Statement, Creator Control Mixer, Circular Protocol Ledger, The Great Library) open modals correctly

legacy_toolbars_hidden.details: ShambhalaToolbar, MANIFEST_BAR (#MANIFEST_BAR), Navigation component, shambhala-ascend button - all NOT rendered on /sovereign-hub

sensitive_data_scrubbed.details: No kyndsmiles@gmail.com or Steven Michael visible in main page text. Note: Steven Michael appears in Trust Purpose Statement modal (expected legal document content)

games_page_no_crash.details: /games page loads successfully, no undefined.map error, CharacterSelect component renders without crash

gravity_well_no_crash.details: /gravity-well page loads successfully with empty state message 'Market loading... gravitational pull stabilizing'

starseed_adventure_no_crash.details: /starseed-adventure page loads, CharacterSelect component renders, no undefined errors in console
